commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=35c6bf7d7af129727ebeb639f0da1d6cfd9ed25e)
commands.review_summary:
The branch removes two slow iMessage image-tool attachment-root integration tests and expands `media-tool-shared.test.ts` to mock the channel inbound-root seam for account and wildcard root coverage.

PR surface: Tests -95. Total -95 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this read-only review. The source path is clear because current main still has two iMessage image-tool cases with `240_000`ms timeouts, and the PR body reports the agents-tools shard timing out there.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The branch is maintainer-labeled and currently dirty/unmergeable, and there is no narrow patch defect for ClawSweeper to repair automatically.

target.title: test: deflake agent image root checks
target.body:
## Summary
- Remove the two slow iMessage attachment-root image-tool integration tests that were timing out in `checks-node-agentic-agents`.
- Keep account and wildcard inbound-root coverage in `media-tool-shared.test.ts` with the channel inbound-root seam mocked, so the agents-tools shard does not bootstrap the bundled iMessage contract path.
- Leave production behavior unchanged.

## Verification
- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write --threads=1 src/agents/tools/image-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/media-tool-shared.test.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-tools.config.ts src/agents/tools/image-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/media-tool-shared.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: `checks-node-agentic-agents` had recent runs spending minutes in the agents-tools shard, with a failure in `src/agents/tools/image-tool.test.ts` after a 240000ms timeout in the iMessage attachment-root tests.
Real environment tested: local Node 24.16.0 checkout with repo dependencies installed via pnpm.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-tools.config.ts src/agents/tools/image-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/media-tool-shared.test.ts --reporter=verbose`.
Evidence after fix: the two touched test files passed together: 2 files, 85 tests, 11.43s.
Observed result after fix: the prior 240s iMessage image-tool integration cases are no longer in the image runtime test path, and the inbound-root resolver coverage completes in milliseconds with the channel seam mocked.
What was not tested: the full `checks-node-agentic-agents` CI shard was not run locally; this PR uses focused touched-file proof.
target.author: romneyda

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
